findings.description: The knowledge file's code example adds a closing `}` for the class that is not present in the source code block. The source RST code block ends after the method's closing `}` without a class-level closing brace.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block ends at `        }` (closing the `testDeleteExpired()` method only). The next line in the source is `テストデータ記述例` (RST section heading), confirming the class closing brace was not included in the original.
